name: OM Group, Inc.
description: OM Group, Inc. was a global technology-based company that specialized in the development and manufacturing of innovative materials, systems, and technologies. The company served a diverse range of industries, including mobile energy storage, electronic devices, renewable energy, and automotive systems. Known for its expertise in specialty chemicals and metal-based products, OM Group provided essential components for high-growth global applications. The company was headquartered in Cleveland, Ohio, and operated as a publicly traded entity on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol OMG before being acquired and integrated into other business entities.
